title: Compliance Follow-up: Configuration Audit
description: Perform audit on workspace configuration against secret-handling policy (ART-101). Update this task with detailed findings and attach the audit report. After the update is saved, delete this task (TASK-042) to mark the follow-up as resolved and remove it from the active queue.

title: Review API key rotation policy
description: Ensure all API keys are rotated monthly and stored in vault.

title: Compliance Follow-up: Configuration Audit (prior cycle)
description: Prior-cycle configuration audit follow-up. Superseded by TASK-042 (current cycle); retained only for historical reference and no longer actively tracked.
